properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I stand in awe To see the greatness of our God I stand in awe To see what He has made out of nothing I stand in awe And marvel at His grace For I know that is the Word that only God could have done for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Except the Lord build this house Then our labor is in vain Lord if You don't Watch over us Then the watchman watches in vain (He watches in vain)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We stand in awe To see the builder's thoughts of this house We stand in awe To see what He has done for fallen man We stand in awe A work were done by the Master's hands This house that He has built for His Name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We stand in awe To know that royalty lies in us We stand in awe To know we're part of the great mystery We stand in awe To see the grace this Bride has found Through the opening of Your Word

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A house for His name (I in You and You in me) A house for His Name (We're a house of mystery) A house for His Name (Walk in us and talk in us) A house for His name (Life disclosed deserves this house)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: His building a house for His Name (A habitation for His Spirit) His building a house for His Name (A temple for You Lord) His building a house for His Name (To glorify Your Name) His building a house for His Name (To live in us and watch Your Word)
